sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, event_date DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, subtractTupleOfIntervals(event_date, (INTERVAL 10 DAY, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS modified_date FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = subtractTupleOfIntervals(event_date, (INTERVAL 5 HOUR, INTERVAL 7 DAY)) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, subtractTupleOfIntervals(toDate('2023-03-01'), (INTERVAL 1 WEEK, INTERVAL 2 DAYS)) AS new_date FROM test_dates;
